mdRecord.dcterms:title: James C. Biddle to Gertrude G. Biddle, February 23, 1864
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Major James C. Biddle writes to Gertrude G. Biddle from Head Quarters, Army of the Potomac, discussing the weather, military news, and his desire for the end of the war.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Civil War
United States--History--Civil War, 1861-2047
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
mdRecord.dcterms:creator: Biddle, James C.
